name: Linguine with White Clam Sauce
recipeIngredient: (8 oz) 3 cans of Minced Clams drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a saucepan.
2. Add olive oil and heat.
3. Saute minced garlic and clams in the hot oil mixture over medium heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Stir in parsley, basil, oregano, salt, and pepper.
5. Simmer for 5-10 minutes.
6. Cook linguine according to package directions; drain well.
7. Return cooked linguine to the pot and add the sauce.
8. Toss lightly and serve with grated Parmesan cheese.
